behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC Cyrrus: short 'U8P_CYRRUS::look' descriptions, a time-of-day driven activity U8P_CYRRUS::schedule, proximity/idle monologues, a full conversation menu, reactions to theft, and a ritual/U8P_CYRRUS::cast routine that can end with the NPC dying and being teleported.
The 'U8P_CYRRUS::look' process returns concise descriptions that vary if Cyrrus is dead and depending on persistent flags (cyrrusName, cyrrusJob).

A U8P_CYRRUS::schedule() process queries the time-of-day (FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod) and writes a numeric cyrrusSchedule which drives which U8P_CYRRUS::schedule-specific handlers run when the player approaches (U8P_CYRRUS::enterFastArea dispatches to U8P_CYRRUS::schedule handlers U8P_CYRRUS::func05B3, U8P_CYRRUS::func0D97, U8P_CYRRUS::func1357).

U8P_CYRRUS::enterFastArea/U8P_CYRRUS::leaveFastArea manage fast-area state: teleport dead actors, reset engine refs, dispatch U8P_CYRRUS::schedule behaviors on entry, and clear the 'just healed' marker (cyrrusJustHealed) on exit.

U8P_CYRRUS::use implements the conversation flow: it builds a dynamic menu (local2), presents Ask, captures the player's choice (local1) and branches dialogue/actions accordingly. Menu options depend heavily on many persistent quest/dialog flags.

U8P_CYRRUS::cast waits for a target, then performs a multi-step ritual (barks, timed waits/animations, frame changes) that clears immortality, marks the NPC dead and teleports it — effectively an in-world sacrificial/scene sequence.
U8P_CYRRUS::AvatarStoleSomething reacts when the player steals: it checks cyrrusSchedule, resets refs, may start an activity (Npc::cSetActivity), issues a complaint bark and schedules follow-ups.
notable_control_flow: Main examine path: U8P_CYRRUS::look -> check Npc::isDead(this) -> if dead bark 'the late Cyrrus' else pick description using cyrrusName and cyrrusJob flags.

Schedule selection: U8P_CYRRUS::schedule queries FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod, sets local U8P_CYRRUS::schedule/value bitmasks, calls METHOD::func143A, suspends and on process_result() writes cyrrusSchedule and calls METHOD::func133F.
Fast-area entry: U8P_CYRRUS::enterFastArea -> if dead, Npc::teleport(random coords) -> resetRef(...) -> dispatch to U8P_CYRRUS::func05B3 / ::func0D97 / ::func1357 depending on cyrrusSchedule.
Conversation loop: U8P_CYRRUS::use builds menu (MenuSet/MenuUnion/MenuRemove/MenuAdd), presents Ask(local2), SuspendAssign(local1), strcmp on local1 to branch, repeat until player picks 'bye'.

Ritual/U8P_CYRRUS::cast: U8P_CYRRUS::cast(sp) loops waiting for a target (spawn FREE::func1C19), then if target present runs sequence: resetRef, bark, spawn FREE::func29D8, METHOD::func15E7, toggle status flag, Item::setFrame, Npc::clrImmortal, Npc::setDead, Npc::teleport(urandom...).
open_questions: Which exact persistent flags are written by the conversation (U8P_CYRRUS::use) — several SetFlag nodes exist but specific flag names were not recovered from the excerpt.

Precise semantics and numeric meanings of the U8P_CYRRUS::schedule-specific bitmask/value constants (local0/local1/local2 in U8P_CYRRUS::schedule()) and how they map to NPC pathing/activities inside METHOD::func143A.

The intent and in-game triggering context of U8P_CYRRUS::cast: is it a player-invoked healing, a scripted sacrificial scene, or tied to quest progression? (inferred as ritual-like but exact quest link is unknown).
What U8P_CYRRUS::func0239 does (called from U8P_CYRRUS::AvatarStoleSomething) — its behavior was referenced but its body was not available in the excerpt.
Whether any other systems (quest state machines) set cyrrusJustHealed or depend on its cleared state in U8P_CYRRUS::leaveFastArea; the exact consumer of that flag is not visible.

main_function.name: U8P_CYRRUS::look
main_function.purpose: Provide a short, context-sensitive description when the player examines Cyrrus; selects wording based on death state and persistent name/job flags.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the player 'looks' at / examines the NPC (process type 0x0208).
Detects actor death via Npc::isDead(this) to show a corpse-specific description.
Reads persistent flags cyrrusName and cyrrusJob to display name/title variants.

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::look
function_map.role: examine/description handler that returns short barks based on death and name/job flags

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::schedule
function_map.role: choose and commit the NPC's time-of-day U8P_CYRRUS::schedule (writes cyrrusSchedule) and trigger activity updates

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry behavior: teleport dead NPCs, reset refs, dispatch U8P_CYRRUS::schedule-specific behavior

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area exit cleanup: clear cyrrusJustHealed and reset fast-area references

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::cast
function_map.role: perform a multi-step U8P_CYRRUS::cast/ritual sequence that can clear immortality, kill and teleport the NPC (accepts a uword selector parameter)

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: reaction to theft: reset refs, possibly start an activity, complain and run a follow-up helper

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::func05B3
function_map.role: U8P_CYRRUS::schedule-specific behavior (cyrrusSchedule==1): monologues, pathfind attempts, barks and timed waits

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::func082B
function_map.role: idle/interaction monologue utility: proximity/random barks for presence and privacy

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::func0D97
function_map.role: U8P_CYRRUS::schedule-specific behavior (cyrrusSchedule==2): pathfind, barks, and timed follow-ups

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::func0F47
function_map.role: dialog/interaction utility supplying polite/solicitous lines (ambient barks)

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::func1357
function_map.role: U8P_CYRRUS::schedule-specific behavior (cyrrusSchedule==3): similar orchestration of pathfind/barks/waits

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::func15A8
function_map.role: idle monologue utility: friendly/distant barks about the island (used when nobody is talking)

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::use
function_map.role: conversation/dialogue handler that builds a dynamic menu, presents Ask, captures choice and branches dialog/actions

function_map.name: U8P_CYRRUS::func5366
function_map.role: short utility: bark about an open door and spawn DOOR_NS::useDoor on a referenced door

internal_calls.purpose: Invoke idle monologue helper when nobodyTalking is false (provide ambient dialogue)
Invoke door-check/short monologue for certain frame/index values
Use generic interaction barks for certain branches
Continue or finalize the theft-reaction sequence (exact effect unknown)
Referenced helper elsewhere; U8P_CYRRUS::schedule influences dialog availability (inferred coupling)

external_calls.purpose: Query current time-of-day to choose cyrrusSchedule branch
Apply or commit movement/activity changes after preparing U8P_CYRRUS::schedule values
Finalize/persist the selected U8P_CYRRUS::schedule after process_result() confirmation
Teleport dead NPC to random coordinates on player approach
Clear internal reference slots as part of fast-area entry reset
Clear internal references and cleanup when leaving the fast area
Check for presence of a combat/interaction target before running the ritual
Spawned as a wait/timer helper in the retry loop when no target is present
Spawned to obtain timing/random value used between ritual steps
Play animations/sounds or enforce wait points around barks and actions
Clear immortality and mark NPC dead as part of the ritual
Change NPC/display frame during the ritual sequence
Attempt to operate an adjacent door object (spawned asynchronously)
Called from dialogue flow; likely a spell/ability related helper invoked as part of a menu branch
Animation/sound/wait helper used around conversation lines
Asynchronously request movement to a target and check process_result() to decide next actions

reads.name: cyrrusSchedule
reads.likely_effect: Used by U8P_CYRRUS::enterFastArea, U8P_CYRRUS::AvatarStoleSomething and other behaviors to choose U8P_CYRRUS::schedule-specific handlers/behavior

reads.name: cyrrusName
reads.likely_effect: Read by U8P_CYRRUS::look() and U8P_CYRRUS::use() to determine whether to display or reference the NPC's personal name

reads.name: cyrrusJob
reads.likely_effect: Read by U8P_CYRRUS::look() and U8P_CYRRUS::use() to determine job/title/treatment (e.g., 'healer' menu options)

reads.name: cyrrusMet
reads.likely_effect: Read by idle monologue helpers (U8P_CYRRUS::func082B/U8P_CYRRUS::func15A8) to select first-meeting vs repeat phrasing

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: Used to decide whether to U8P_CYRRUS::use ambient monologues or alternate branches in U8P_CYRRUS::schedule handlers

reads.name: torwinJumped / torwinMet / spokeAboutTorwinS / spokeAboutTorwinX
reads.likely_effect: Used by conversation and monologue helpers to gate Torwin-related lines and menu options

reads.name: attemptedWisdomTest / passedWisdomTest / attemptedCenteredTest / passedCenteredTest / passedThirdTest / hasBreath / hasRing / hasOwnFoci / stratosMet
reads.likely_effect: Quest/dialog gating flags consulted by U8P_CYRRUS::use to add/remove menu options

writes.name: cyrrusSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Set by U8P_CYRRUS::schedule to control which U8P_CYRRUS::schedule-specific behavior runs; written after confirmation via process_result()

writes.name: cyrrusJustHealed
writes.likely_effect: Cleared (set to 0) by U8P_CYRRUS::leaveFastArea as part of fast-area cleanup; used to mark recent healing state

writes.name: various dialog/quest flags (unnamed in excerpt)
writes.likely_effect: U8P_CYRRUS::use contains SetFlag nodes that update persistent conversation/quest flags (exact names not recovered)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC Cyrrus: short 'U8P_CYRRUS::look' descriptions, a time-of-day driven activity U8P_CYRRUS::schedule, proximity/idle monologues, a full conversation menu, reactions to theft, and a ritual/U8P_CYRRUS::cast routine that can end with the NPC dying and being teleported.
